title: Core Asteroids Cracked
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cracks FROM AsteroidCracked WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {cracks} core asteroid(s) cracked during the report period. Core mining demands precision — each crack is a correctly placed seismic charge detonation that splits open a rock to reveal the gems inside. A large crack count is a genuine badge of mining expertise.
details.help: AsteroidCracked fires when a core asteroid is successfully detonated with seismic charges. Each event is a successful core-mining split.

tagLines: Core detonation events logged. Seismic charge consumption noted in the mining operations record.
Some commanders shoot ships. You shoot asteroids. With charges. From the inside.
A good crack sounds different from a bad one. You know the difference. That's the skill.
